summary:
I’ve fixed the quorum check so that a candidate only becomes leader if it has more than half the cluster’s votes (i.e. ≥ totalNodes/2 + 1), instead of ≥ totalNodes/2. This prevents both sides of a 2/3 partition in a 5-node cluster from each reaching “2 votes” and electing their own leader. Running `bash test.sh` now yields:

PASS: No split-brain detected across all rounds
